creator: danfe@FreeBSD.org
text: I've attempted to stagify this port and cleanup it a bit, but there is more work remains: investigate the problem behind "don't USE_ZIP as this breaks EXTRACT_CMD"; port also has CMake in BUILD_DEPENDS, perhaps it can be converted to USES=cmake?  It would also be nice to make PulseAudio plugin and dependency optional: PA is a heavy port, usually not enabled by default in other ports, and many people hate it.
